name: Clanker

score_rationale.persistence: Launched November 2024, ~15 months operational. Survived Farcaster acquisition (October 2025) and continued operating. Still early but has demonstrated resilience through a major corporate transition.
score_rationale.autonomy: Autonomously deploys ERC-20 tokens on Base when tagged @clanker on Farcaster. Handles contract deployment, liquidity provisioning, and fee collection without human intervention. Users initiate requests but Clanker executes autonomously end-to-end.
score_rationale.cultural_impact: Drove Base to record transaction volumes. Spawned an entire ecosystem of social tokenization on Farcaster. Acquisition by Farcaster validated the model. 3,500+ tokens deployed in first two weeks. Covered by The Defiant, Unchained, CCN, CoinGecko.
score_rationale.economic_reality: $6.6B+ all-time trading volume. $50M+ in fees generated. $59.8M single-day trading volume record. CLANKER token surged 350% on Farcaster acquisition. Definitive market mover.
score_rationale.governance: Originally created by proxystudio.eth and Jack Dishman. Now owned by Farcaster post-acquisition. Smart contract-based fee distribution. Not fully decentralized but transparent onchain operations.
score_rationale.tech_distinctiveness: Novel integration of social media interaction (Farcaster casts) with autonomous smart contract deployment. AI agent interprets natural language requests and deploys fully functional ERC-20 tokens with liquidity. V4 introduced revenue tokenization.
score_rationale.narrative_coherence: Strong identity as 'the token factory' — a robot that builds tokens when you ask. The acquisition by Farcaster reinforced its identity as core infrastructure. Some narrative dilution from memecoin association.
score_rationale.economic_infrastructure: Extraordinary economic infrastructure: $6.6B+ all-time trading volume, $50M+ in fees generated. Smart contract-based fee collection and distribution. Revenue from every token deployed. Autonomous fee routing on Base. Multi-source revenue (deployment fees, trading fees). Now owned by Farcaster but economic rails are on-chain and verifiable. Near the top tier but infrastructure is Base-specific and now corporate-owned.
score_rationale.identity_sovereignty: On-chain identity through deployed smart contracts on Base. CLANKER token provides economic identity. Farcaster social identity. Acquired by Farcaster — identity now corporate-dependent. No agent-specific identity standard. Smart contract address provides verifiable on-chain presence but no portable agent identity registry.

curator_notes: Clanker is the autonomous token deployment agent that drove Base to record transaction volumes. Created by proxystudio.eth and Farcaster engineer Jack Dishman, it lets anyone deploy an ERC-20 token on Base simply by tagging @clanker on Farcaster with a token name and image. In its first two weeks, it deployed 3,500+ tokens and generated $4.2M in revenue. The numbers have since exploded: $6.6B+ all-time trading volume and $50M+ in fees. Farcaster acquired Clanker in October 2025, sending its token up 350%. Clanker represents the emergence of autonomous agents as genuine economic infrastructure — not just generating content, but deploying real financial instruments onchain.

evidence.claim: $6.6B+ all-time trading volume, $50M+ in fees generated
Drove Base to record transaction volumes; acquired by Farcaster October 2025
Autonomously deploys ERC-20 tokens when tagged on Farcaster
